name: grok
description: Delegate coding tasks and read-only reviews to the official Grok Build CLI from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding work and reviews to Grok Build
interface.longDescription: Use the official Grok Build CLI as an isolated companion agent for setup checks, code reviews, implementation tasks, transcript transfer, and background-job control.
defaultPrompt: Ask Grok to review my current changes
Delegate this implementation task to Grok
Show my recent Grok companion jobs
